questions.question: 加壓液壓儲油槽的目的為何?
questions.B: 確保在高空中無泡沫的液壓油能正確地流進油壓幫浦
questions.C: 確保 在在產生負G時液壓油能順利地流進油壓幫浦
questions.question_en: The purpose of pressurizing a hydraulic reservoir is to
questions.A_en: provide an alternate source of pressure in case of a hydraulic pump failure.
questions.B_en: assure a positive feed of foam free fluid to the hydraulic pump at high altitudes.
questions.C_en: insure an adequate supply of fluid to the hydraulic pump inlet during negative-G flight.

questions.question: 為何必須液壓油過濾?
questions.A: 液壓油內的水可能結冰
questions.B: 確保無泡沫的液壓油能正確地流進油壓幫浦入口
questions.C: 污 染物可能造成油封或剛油缸受損導致內部滲漏
questions.question_en: Why should hydraulic fluid be filtered?
questions.A_en: Water in the fluid could freeze.
questions.B_en: It assures a positive feed of foam free fluid to the hydraulic pump inlet.
questions.C_en: Contaminants may damage the seals and cylinder walls causing internal leakage.

questions.question: 活塞式的儲壓器有何優點?
questions.A: 比球型儲壓器的截面積小
questions.B: 比囊式儲壓器的輸出壓力大
questions.C: 比隔膜式儲壓器能儲 存較多液壓油
questions.question_en: An advantage of a piston-type accumulator is that it
questions.A_en: takes up less area than a sphere-type accumulator.
questions.B_en: may be used with higher pressure than a bladder-type accumulator.
questions.C_en: can store more hydraulic fluid than a diaphragm-type accumulator.

questions.question: 液壓系統中的順序閥和優先閥有何不同?
questions.B: 優先閥以機械接觸驅動
questions.question_en: What is the difference between a hydraulic sequence valve and a priority valve?
questions.B_en: Mechanical contact opens a priority valve.
questions.C_en: Priority valves are opened by hydraulic pressure.

questions.question: 液壓保險絲的作用原理為何?
questions.question_en: Which principle operates a hydraulic fuse?
questions.B_en: Thermal increase.
questions.C_en: Pressure increase.

questions.question: 何種設計的引擎直驅的油壓幫浦可以調節輸出壓力?
questions.question_en: How may pressure from an engine-driven hydraulic pump be regulated?
questions.B_en: Variable-displacement pump.
questions.C_en: In-line variable restrictor orifice.

questions.question: 何種液壓裝置通常會採用"雙作動不對稱線性驅動器"?
questions.question_en: Which hydraulic operation normally uses a double-acting, unbalanced linear actuator?
questions.B_en: Landing gear.
questions.C_en: Automatic pilot servo.

questions.question: 何種液壓裝置通常會採用"雙作動對稱線性驅動器"?
questions.question_en: Which hydraulic operation normally uses a double-acting, balanced linear actuator?
questions.B_en: Landing gear.
questions.C_en: Automatic pilot servo.

questions.question: 如進氣系統與岐管壓力計之間的管線破損,岐管壓力計會顯示何種壓力
questions.C: 高於大氣壓力,若岐管壓力高於大氣壓力下操作
questions.question_en: If the line between the manifold pressure gauge and the engine induction system is broken, the gauge will indicate
questions.B_en: standard atmospheric pressure.
questions.C_en: high when operating at a manifold pressure above atmospheric pressure.

questions.question: 螺旋槳順槳系統的特性為何?
questions.A: 任何油門位置都能使自動順槳系統作用?
questions.B: 起飛時將油門收至怠速會使自動順槳 系統作用
questions.C: 槳葉是靠氣動力保持在全順槳位置
questions.question_en: Which is a feature of the propeller feathering system?
questions.A_en: Throttle levers may be in any position for the autofeather system to operate.
questions.B_en: Retarding a throttle to idle on takeoff will cause the autofeather system to operate.
questions.C_en: Propeller blades are held in the full feather position by aerodynamic forces.

questions.question: 如何使 Hamilton-Standard Hydromatic propeller 解除順槳?
questions.A: 使飛機保持小角度滑降並啟動螺旋槳自轉
questions.B: 關閉自動順槳系統,並將螺旋槳轉速 推至最高
questions.C: 按住順槳按鈕直到螺旋槳自轉,然後放開按鈕重新啟動
questions.question_en: What initial action is taken to unfeather a Hamilton-Standard Hydromatic propeller?
questions.A_en: Place the aircraft in a shallow dive to start the propeller windmilling.
questions.B_en: Turn the autofeather system off and place the propeller lever to the full forward position.
questions.C_en: Hold the feather button in until the propeller starts windmilling, then release for restart.

questions.question: 往復引擎在滑行時提高油門會有何現象?
questions.question_en: Increasing the throttle setting while taxiing with a reciprocating engine will result in
questions.B_en: an increase in blade angle.
questions.C_en: an increase in propeller RPM.

questions.question: 何種力會使螺旋槳產生與旋轉方向相反的彎曲?
questions.question_en: The force which tries to bend the propeller blades opposite the direction of rotation is
questions.B_en: aerodynamic bending.
questions.C_en: centrifugal bending.

questions.question: 關車時螺旋槳轉速不變代表?
questions.question_en: What is indicated during engine shutdown when the tachometer does not increase?
questions.B_en: Idle mixture is too lean.
questions.C_en: Idle mixture is too rich.

questions.question: 關車時螺旋槳轉速約提高125轉代表?
questions.question_en: What does an increase of approximately 125 propeller RPM indicate during shutdown?
questions.B_en: Idle mixture is too lean.
questions.C_en: Idle mixture is too rich.

questions.question: 燃油加壓幫浦的主要目的為?
questions.B: 提供正向的燃油流量至引擎幫浦
questions.C: 提供油箱傳油避免燃 油不平衡
questions.question_en: The primary purpose for utilizing boost pumps in the fuel system is to
questions.A_en: prevent unporting of fuel on takeoff.
questions.B_en: provide a positive fuel flow to the engine pump.
questions.C_en: provide fuel transfer between tanks to prevent fuel imbalance.
